alkylation reagent: addition of 5 μl of 180 mm iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: addition of 5 μl of 180 mm iodoacetamide
enrichment method: concentrated proteins by adsorption onto StrataClean
fragmentation method: selected for fragmentation by higher energy collisional dissociation
instrument: coupled to a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: addition of 5 μl of 60 mm DTT
reduction concentration: addition of 5 μl of 60 mm DTT
